title: Recipe Tweaks
description: This is a data pack all about improving crafting. Everything you never even knew you wanted, but needed, AND everything you always knew you wanted and needed. Basically, everything you've ever wanted and/or needed.
body:
### The video below covers v1.0 and isn't entirely representative of the recipes in the latest version
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/eHkd3nOhf3M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

  _Recipe Tweaks_ is a data pack all about improving crafting. Everything you never even knew you wanted, but needed, AND everything you always knew you wanted and needed. Basically, everything you ever wanted and/or needed.​

  More consistent recipes, more renewable decorative blocks, more time-saving, convenient additions, more items you can make without having to place down a crafting table and fair stairs. Visit [my website](https://inkor-s-universe.weebly.com/recipe-tweaks.html) or watch the trailer to find out more.

###   Join [the Discord server](https://discord.gg/K74zkuz) for updates. You can also reach out for help there, or on [Twitter](http://twitter.com/iNkoR_the_2nd).



Logos by:
- (2D) [Nary](https://twitter.com/Narynotnarold)
- (3D) [UnRoman](https://www.twitter.com/un_roman_)

Other resources:
- [_Recipe Tweaks_ on my website](https://inkor-s-universe.weebly.com/recipe-tweaks.html)
- [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/recipe-tweaks/)
